title: senecio aquaticus subsp. erraticus
intro: Senecio aquaticus subsp. erraticus, also known as the variable water senecio, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Western Europe. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio aquaticus subsp. erraticus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
